posts.author: Olya (Olya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

My client have just bought the Enterprise Portfolio solution.
And they can’t ‘Go to Project’ they have just created from Portfolio board.
In the company thete are different departments with different private projects, and now the monday OS does not allow any of them go to the Project using "Go to project’ link.
But this is not the behavior of the system that I expected. If the Portfolio is used by different teams with their own private Projects, then no one will be able to go to their own Project from Portfolio. This is not correct in my opinion, and the client does not like it either.

What are you trying to achieve

I vant to be able to go to the Project I created or my team created from the Portfolio.
